title: parageum bulgaricum
intro: Parageum bulgaricum, also known as Bulgarian rose plant or Rosa damascena, is a fragrant flowering plant native to Bulgaria. The medicinal properties of Parageum bulgaricum lie in its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. The health benefits of Parageum bulgaricum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and promoting overall well-being due to its calming and soothing properties. Herbal preparations of Parageum bulgaricum include rose oil, rosewater, and dried rose petals, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
